meta_title: For Founders: portfolio building to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to portfolio building and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Portfolio Building to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop waiting for inspiration. Use this founder-focused checklist to build high-value AI products using Antigravity and Claude Code today.
content.answer_block: The 'no ideas' paralysis is a trap for aspiring founders. Stop brainstorming and start shipping micro-SaaS tools. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative development, you can build, deploy, and monetize functional portfolio pieces that prove your technical authority to future customers.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You’ve got the hunger to build, but the market feels saturated and your mind feels empty. You’re waiting for the 'perfect' idea, but in the world of AI-native SaaS, the perfect idea is a myth—only execution matters.

We’re going to pivot from passive thinking to active building. By treating your portfolio as a series of revenue-generating experiments, you stop building 'projects' and start building a business engine. Let's use modern tooling to slash your development time and get your first MVP live before the weekend is over.

steps.title: Identify a Micro-Pain Point
steps.description: Don't build a platform. Build a utility. Find a repetitive task in a niche market and automate it with AI. Focus on high-frequency, low-complexity problems.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a SaaS market researcher. Identify 5 micro-SaaS opportunities for independent creators that can be solved with a single LLM API call. Focus on high-intent, low-competition niches.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a production-ready boilerplate. We need authentication, database connectivity, and an AI integration layer immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Next.js 15 application with Supabase integration and a structured API route for OpenAI completions. Include basic Tailwind CSS styling.

steps.title: Implement the Core AI Logic
steps.description: Focus on the 'magic moment'—the exact point where your AI provides value. Keep the UI minimal and the logic robust.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust server-side function to handle streaming AI responses, including error handling and cost-tracking middleware.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Implement streaming AI response logic with error handling in app/api/generate/route.ts'

steps.title: Accelerate with Claude Code
steps.description: Use the CLI to refactor and debug. Don't touch the code manually unless necessary; let the AI handle the heavy lifting of state management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review my current codebase for performance bottlenecks and suggest optimizations for faster API response times.

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Ship it. Put it on a live URL and share it with 10 potential users. If they don't use it, pivot the feature, not the product.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment script and a README.md file that emphasizes the value proposition for early adopters.

pro_tips: Build a 'Waitlist' landing page first; if nobody signs up, don't build the product.
Use Stripe's 'Payment Links' instead of building a complex billing dashboard for your MVP.
Prioritize 'Time-to-First-Value' over feature depth; your MVP should be usable in under 30 seconds.
Always log AI usage costs per user to ensure your free-tier doesn't bankrupt your startup.
Document your build process in public on X or LinkedIn to build an audience while you code.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, share the link in relevant communities. Gather feedback, iterate based on user usage data, and prepare to monetize once you hit 100 active users.
content.conversion_block: Stop dreaming, start building. The market rewards those who ship, not those who plan. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
